---
title: "ALS data coverage in Canadian forests"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
engine: knitr
lightbox: true
date: today
language:
  title-block-published: "Last modified"
---

<style>
#title-block-header,
#quarto-header,
#quarto-header-headroom {
  display: none !important;
}
</style>

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggiraph)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggtext)
library(htmltools)
source("R/site_components.R")

Stats <- readRDS("layers/Stats.rds")
theTable <- Stats$theTable

coverage_file_date <- get_latest_coverage_date()

total_ALS_area <- Stats$total_ALS_area
total_ALS_perc <- round(Stats$total_ALS_perc, 1)
managed_ALS_perc <- round(Stats$managed_ALS_perc, 1)
forested_ALS_perc <- round(Stats$forested_ALS_perc, 1)

summary_multitemporal_list <- readRDS("layers/summary_multitemporal_list.rds")
summary_multitemporal_Canada <- summary_multitemporal_list$summary_multitemporal_Canada
summary_multitemporal_managed <- summary_multitemporal_list$summary_multitemporal_managed

total_ALS_area_million <- round(total_ALS_area / 1000000, 2)
multitemporal_area <- as.numeric(summary_multitemporal_Canada$total_multitemporal_ALS_area)
multitemporal_area_million <- round(multitemporal_area / 1000000, 2)
multitemporal_canada_perc <- round(summary_multitemporal_Canada$total_multitemporal_ALS_area_prop, 1)
multitemporal_managed_perc <- round(summary_multitemporal_managed$total_managed_multitemporal_ALS_area_prop, 1)

prov_clrs <- tribble(
  ~Jurisdiction, ~color,
  "AB", "#1f78b4",
  "BC", "#33a02c",
  "NB", "#6a3d9a",
  "NS", "#ff7f00",
  "ON", "#666666",
  "PE", "#800000",
  "QC", "#b15928",
  "SK", "#c71585"
)

clrs <- prov_clrs$color
names(clrs) <- prov_clrs$Jurisdiction

coverage_time <- readRDS("layers/dataForTheFigure_v4.rds")
site_font_family <- "system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif"

getNewestFileDate <- function(dir) {
  path_dir <- file.path("layers", "source_layers", dir)
  source_exts <- c(
    "shp", "gpkg", "geojson", "json", "zip", "rds",
    "tif", "tiff", "vrt", "parquet", "csv", "fgb", "gdb"
  )

  flist <- fs::dir_info(path_dir, recurse = TRUE, type = "file") |>
    mutate(
      ext = tolower(fs::path_ext(path))
    ) |>
    filter(ext %in% source_exts) |>
    arrange(desc(modification_time))

  if (nrow(flist) == 0) {
    return(as.Date(NA))
  }

  as.Date(flist$modification_time[[1]])
}

tbl_updates <- tibble(Jurisdiction = c("BC", "AB", "SK", "ON", "QC", "NB", "PE", "NS")) |>
  mutate(
    `Last update` = vapply(
      Jurisdiction,
      function(x) {
        dt <- getNewestFileDate(x)
        if (is.na(dt)) "Unknown" else format(dt, "%Y-%m-%d")
      },
      character(1)
    )
  )

jurisdiction_labels <- tribble(
  ~Jurisdiction, ~Jurisdiction_label,
  "BC", "British Columbia (BC)",
  "AB", "Alberta (AB)",
  "SK", "Saskatchewan (SK)",
  "ON", "Ontario (ON)",
  "QC", "Quebec (QC)",
  "NB", "New Brunswick (NB)",
  "PE", "Prince Edward Island (PE)",
  "NS", "Nova Scotia (NS)"
)

data_sources_combined <- tribble(
  ~Jurisdiction, ~`Data source`, ~`Data sharing policy`,
  "BC", "BC Ministry of Forests and [lidar.gov.bc.ca](https://lidar.gov.bc.ca/).", "ALS open data. DEM and CHM from systematic provincial acquisition will be shared. [www.lidar.gov.bc.ca](https://www.lidar.gov.bc.ca)",
  "AB", "AB Forestry and Parks, Alberta Biodiversity Monitoring Institute (ABMI).", "Initial provincial coverage ALS data and derivatives were acquired with a licence. Sharing is limited to GoA partners for collaborative projects and forest industry. FRIP-funded industry projects are not currently open. ABMI acquisitions [will be made freely available](https://abmi.ca/home/news-events/news/Open-Lidar-Data-Announcement.html?mode=detail&scroll).",
  "SK", "SK Ministry of Environment.", "ALS point clouds are not currently shared as open data. Derivatives (DEM) are shared openly, though not all are lidar-derived: [environment-saskatchewan.hub.arcgis.com](https://environment-saskatchewan.hub.arcgis.com/pages/forest_resource_inventory).",
  "ON", "Ministry of Natural Resources.", "ALS point clouds and derivatives (DEM, CHM, DSM) are open data, available at [geohub.lio.gov.on.ca](https://geohub.lio.gov.on.ca/maps/lio::forest-resources-inventory-leaf-on-lidar/about).",
  "QC", "Ministere des Ressources naturelles et des Forets, [donneesquebec.ca/recherche/dataset/donnees-lidar-du-quebec](https://www.donneesquebec.ca/recherche/dataset/donnees-lidar-du-quebec).", "ALS open data: [donneesquebec.ca/recherche/dataset/donnees-lidar-du-quebec](https://www.donneesquebec.ca/recherche/dataset/donnees-lidar-du-quebec).",
  "NB", "NB Natural Resources and Energy Development, and [www.snb.ca/geonb1](http://www.snb.ca/geonb1/e/dc/catalogue-E.asp).", "ALS data are open and available for download: [www.snb.ca/geonb1/e/dc/lidar.asp](http://www.snb.ca/geonb1/e/dc/lidar.asp). Derivatives (DEM, CHM, hillshade, slope) are also available as [WMS/WCS service](https://www2.gnb.ca/content/gnb/en/departments/erd/open-data/raster-data.html#12).",
  "PE", "Prince Edward Island Department of Environment, Energy and Climate Action.", "ALS data available for download: [download-telecharger.services.geo.ca](https://download-telecharger.services.geo.ca/pub/elevation/pointclouds_nuagespoints/PEI/).",
  "NS", "[nsgi.novascotia.ca/datalocator](https://nsgi.novascotia.ca/datalocator/elevation/) and Department of Natural Resources and Renewables.", "ALS files and derivatives are open data ([nsgi.novascotia.ca/datalocator/elevation/](https://nsgi.novascotia.ca/datalocator/elevation/))."
) |>
  left_join(jurisdiction_labels, by = "Jurisdiction") |>
  left_join(tbl_updates, by = "Jurisdiction") |>
  mutate(
    `Source and sharing` = paste0(
      "<strong>Source:</strong> ", `Data source`, "<br>",
      "<strong>Access:</strong> ", `Data sharing policy`
    )
  ) |>
  transmute(
    Jurisdiction = Jurisdiction_label,
    `Last update` = `Last update`,
    `Source and sharing`
  )
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results='asis'}
nav_card <- function(href, eyebrow, title, image_src, image_alt, extra_class = NULL) {
  tags$a(
    class = paste("homepage-nav-card", extra_class),
    href = href,
    tags$div(
      class = "homepage-nav-card-media",
      tags$img(src = image_src, alt = image_alt, loading = "lazy"),
      tags$div(
        class = "homepage-nav-card-copy",
        tags$span(class = "homepage-nav-eyebrow", eyebrow),
        tags$h3(title)
      )
    ),
  )
}

browsable(
  tagList(
    tags$header(
      id = "overview",
      class = "homepage-fixed-header",
      tags$div(
        class = "homepage-fixed-header-inner",
        tags$a(
          href = "#overview",
          class = "homepage-site-mark",
          tags$span("Canada Forest ALS")
        ),
        tags$nav(
          class = "homepage-topnav",
          tags$a(href = "#interactive-map", "Map"),
          tags$a(href = "#summary", "Summary"),
          tags$a(href = "#publication", "Publication"),
          tags$a(href = "#data-sources", "Data sources"),
          tags$a(href = "contact.html", "Contact"),
          tags$a(
            href = "https://github.com/ptompalski/CanadaForestLidarCoverage",
            class = "homepage-topnav-iconlink",
            `aria-label` = "GitHub repository",
            title = "GitHub repository",
            HTML('<svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false"><path fill="currentColor" d="M8 0C3.58 0 0 3.58 0 8a8 8 0 0 0 5.47 7.59c.4.07.55-.17.55-.38 0-.19-.01-.82-.01-1.49-2.01.37-2.53-.49-2.69-.94-.09-.23-.48-.94-.82-1.13-.28-.15-.68-.52-.01-.53.63-.01 1.08.58 1.23.82.72 1.21 1.87.87 2.33.66.07-.52.28-.87.5-1.07-1.78-.2-3.64-.89-3.64-3.95 0-.87.31-1.59.82-2.15-.08-.2-.36-1.02.08-2.12 0 0 .67-.21 2.2.82a7.5 7.5 0 0 1 4 0c1.53-1.04 2.2-.82 2.2-.82.44 1.1.16 1.92.08 2.12.51.56.82 1.27.82 2.15 0 3.07-1.87 3.75-3.65 3.95.29.25.54.73.54 1.48 0 1.07-.01 1.93-.01 2.2 0 .21.15.46.55.38A8 8 0 0 0 16 8c0-4.42-3.58-8-8-8Z"></path></svg>')
          )
        )
      )
    ),
    tags$section(
      class = "column-screen homepage-intro-band homepage-anchor-target",
      tags$div(
        class = "homepage-hero-copy",
        tags$p(class = "homepage-eyebrow", "National ALS coverage overview"),
        tags$h1("ALS data coverage in Canadian forests"),
        tags$p(
          class = "homepage-hero-lede",
          "Current airborne laser scanning coverage across Canada's forested landscapes."
        ),
        tags$p(
          class = "homepage-hero-update",
          paste("Last coverage update:", coverage_file_date)
        ),
        tags$section(
          class = "homepage-stats-band homepage-stats-band-hero",
          tags$div(
            class = "homepage-stats-grid",
            tags$article(
              class = "homepage-stat",
              tags$p(class = "homepage-stat-label", "Total ALS coverage"),
              tags$p(
                class = "homepage-stat-value",
                tags$span(class = "homepage-stat-number", `data-target` = total_ALS_area_million, `data-decimals` = 2, "0"),
                tags$span(class = "homepage-stat-suffix", HTML("M km<sup>2</sup>"))
              ),
              tags$p(class = "homepage-stat-detail", sprintf("%.1f%% of Canada's land area", total_ALS_perc))
            ),
            tags$article(
              class = "homepage-stat",
              tags$p(class = "homepage-stat-label", "Forested ecozones covered"),
              tags$p(
                class = "homepage-stat-value",
                tags$span(class = "homepage-stat-number", `data-target` = forested_ALS_perc, `data-decimals` = 1, "0"),
                tags$span(class = "homepage-stat-suffix", "%")
              ),
              tags$p(class = "homepage-stat-detail", "Coverage across Canada's forested ecozones")
            ),
            tags$article(
              class = "homepage-stat",
              tags$p(class = "homepage-stat-label", "Managed forests covered"),
              tags$p(
                class = "homepage-stat-value",
                tags$span(class = "homepage-stat-number", `data-target` = managed_ALS_perc, `data-decimals` = 1, "0"),
                tags$span(class = "homepage-stat-suffix", "%")
              ),
              tags$p(class = "homepage-stat-detail", "Managed forest area with ALS coverage")
            ),
            tags$article(
              class = "homepage-stat",
              tags$p(class = "homepage-stat-label", "Multitemporal ALS area"),
              tags$p(
                class = "homepage-stat-value",
                tags$span(class = "homepage-stat-number", `data-target` = multitemporal_area_million, `data-decimals` = 2, "0"),
                tags$span(class = "homepage-stat-suffix", HTML("M km<sup>2</sup>"))
              ),
              tags$p(
                class = "homepage-stat-detail",
                sprintf("%.1f%% of Canada and %.1f%% of managed forests", multitemporal_canada_perc, multitemporal_managed_perc)
              )
            )
          )
        )
      )
    ),
    tags$section(
      id = "interactive-map",
      class = "column-screen homepage-map-band homepage-anchor-target",
      tags$iframe(
        class = "homepage-map-frame",
        src = "home-map.html",
        title = "Interactive ALS coverage map",
        loading = "lazy"
      )
    )
  )
)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results='asis'}
browsable(
  tags$section(
    id = "explore",
    class = "level2 page-columns page-full homepage-anchor-target",
    tags$h2(class = "anchored", `data-anchor-id` = "explore", "Additional maps"),
    tags$div(
      class = "column-body",
      tags$div(
        class = "homepage-card-grid homepage-card-grid-explore",
        nav_card("maps.html", "Static maps", "National overview", "img/map1_ALS_coverage.png", "National static ALS coverage map"),
        nav_card("maps-west.html", "Static maps", "Western Canada", "img/map1_ALS_coverage_focused1.png", "Western Canada static ALS coverage map"),
        nav_card("maps-east.html", "Static maps", "Eastern Canada", "img/map1_ALS_coverage_focused2.png", "Eastern Canada static ALS coverage map"),
        nav_card("multitemporal.html", "Static maps", "Multitemporal data", "img/map4_ALS_overlap_focus1.png", "Multitemporal static ALS overlap map", "homepage-nav-card-zoom")
      )
    )
  )
)
```

## Summary {#summary}

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results='asis'}
browsable(
  tags$section(
    class = "homepage-section-intro homepage-anchor-target",
    tags$p(
      class = "homepage-body-copy homepage-body-copy-wide",
      "The maps and descriptive statistics on this site show the current extent, availability, and characteristics of ALS data in Canada, with a focus on forestry applications. The compilation is limited to acquisitions within Canada's forested ecozones and does not include ALS collected for urban areas or individual research projects."
    )
  )
)
```

### Coverage by jurisdiction

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
knitr::kable(theTable)
```

### Coverage over time

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
coverage_time_latest <- coverage_time %>%
  group_by(jurisdiction_code) %>%
  filter(year == max(year, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  slice_tail(n = 1) %>%
  ungroup()

g <- coverage_time %>%
  ggplot(aes(
    year,
    cumulative_total_ALS_acquisition_area,
    color = jurisdiction_code,
    group = jurisdiction_code,
    tooltip = tip,
    data_id = jurisdiction_code
  )) +
  geom_line_interactive(aes(tooltip = NULL), linewidth = 1.2, alpha = 0.95) +
  geom_point_interactive(
    hover_nearest = FALSE,
    size = 7 / .pt,
    stroke = 0.35,
    hover_css = "r:4px;",
    selected_css = "r:1px;"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = coverage_time_latest,
    aes(
      x = year + 0.45,
      y = cumulative_total_ALS_acquisition_area,
      label = jurisdiction_code,
      color = jurisdiction_code
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    hjust = 0,
    size = 3.5,
    fontface = "bold",
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  xlab("Acquisition year") +
  ylab(expression(paste("Cumulative ALS area [thousands of km"^2 * "]"))) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(min(coverage_time$year), max(coverage_time$year), by = 5),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.14))
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.08))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = clrs, guide = "none") +
  labs(
    title = NULL,
    subtitle = NULL,
    caption = paste(
      "Cumulative area of ALS acquisitions. Overlapping ALS areas are included in totals.<br>",
      "Hover points for jurisdiction-level coverage percentages.<br>",
      "P<sub>J</sub> = percentage of jurisdictional area that is covered by ALS data.<br>",
      "P<sub>M</sub> = percentage of jurisdictional managed forest area that is covered by ALS data."
    )
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_family = site_font_family) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "#9aa9b5", linewidth = 0.35),
    axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "#9aa9b5", linewidth = 0.35),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 11, colour = "#31424f"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10, colour = "#4e6475"),
    plot.title = element_blank(),
    plot.subtitle = element_blank(),
    plot.caption = element_markdown(size = 8.4, colour = "#7a8a96", lineheight = 1.4),
    plot.margin = margin(6, 56, 8, 8)
  )

g <- girafe(ggobj = g, width_svg = 8, height_svg = 5.1)

g <- girafe_options(
  g,
  opts_hover(css = "opacity:1;"),
  opts_hover_inv(css = "opacity:0.18;"),
  opts_selection(css = "opacity:1;"),
  opts_selection_inv(css = "opacity:0.18;"),
  opts_tooltip(
    css = "background-color: #333333;
           color: #ffffff;
           font-family: 'Roboto';
           font-size: 14px;
           border-radius: 6px;
           padding: 5px 10px;
           border: 1px solid #999999;"
  )
)

g
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results='asis'}
browsable(
  tags$section(
    id = "publication",
    class = "column-screen homepage-paper-band homepage-anchor-target",
    tags$div(
      class = "homepage-paper-band-inner",
      tags$div(
        class = "homepage-paper-copy",
        tags$p(class = "homepage-section-kicker", "Related publication"),
        tags$h2("Enhanced forest inventories in Canada: implementation, status, and research needs"),
        tags$p(
          class = "homepage-body-copy",
          "This website extends the published national overview with updated coverage sources, current summary statistics, and interactive map products that continue to evolve beyond the paper snapshot."
        ),
        tags$p(
          class = "homepage-paper-citation",
          HTML("White, J.C., Tompalski, P., Bater, C.W., Wulder, M.A., Fortin, M., Hennigar, C., Robere-McGugan, G., Sinclair, I., White, R. (2025). <strong>Enhanced forest inventories in Canada: implementation, status, and research needs.</strong> Canadian Journal of Forest Research, 55: 1-37.")
        ),
        tags$div(
          class = "homepage-paper-actions",
          tags$a(
            href = "https://doi.org/10.1139/cjfr-2024-0255",
            class = "homepage-button homepage-button-primary",
            "Read the paper"
          )
        )
      ),
      tags$div(
        class = "homepage-paper-media",
        tags$img(
          src = "img/paper.png",
          alt = "Front page of the related publication"
        )
      )
    )
  )
)
```

## Data sources {#data-sources}

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results='asis'}
browsable(
  tags$section(
    class = "homepage-section-intro homepage-anchor-target",
    tags$p(class = "homepage-section-kicker", "Coverage sources and availability"),
    tags$p(
      class = "homepage-body-copy homepage-body-copy-wide",
      HTML("The jurisdictional coverage layers in this compilation come from a mix of public download services and direct exchanges with provincial organizations responsible for ALS data management. <code>Last update</code> is the date when the jurisdictional coverage layer in this project was refreshed, not the date of the latest ALS acquisition.")
    )
  )
)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
knitr::kable(data_sources_combined, escape = FALSE)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results='asis'}
browsable(
  tags$section(
    class = "homepage-section-intro homepage-additional-sources",
    tags$p(class = "homepage-section-kicker", "Additional ALS datasets in Canada"),
    tags$ul(
      class = "homepage-body-copy-wide homepage-source-list",
      tags$li(tags$a(href = "https://open.canada.ca/data/en/dataset/957782bf-847c-4644-a757-e383c0057995", "High Resolution Digital Elevation Model (HRDEM) - CanElevation Series")),
      tags$li(tags$a(href = "https://open.canada.ca/data/en/dataset/0fe65119-e96e-4a57-8bfe-9d9245fba06b", "High Resolution Digital Elevation Model Mosaic (HRDEM Mosaic) CanElevation Series")),
      tags$li(tags$a(href = "https://natural-resources.canada.ca/maps-tools-publications/satellite-elevation-air-photos/national-elevation-data-strategy", "National Elevation Data Strategy")),
      tags$li(tags$a(href = "https://open.canada.ca/data/en/dataset/7069387e-9986-4297-9f55-0288e9676947", "LiDAR Point Clouds - CanElevation Series")),
      tags$li(tags$a(href = "https://opendata.nfis.org/mapserver/PRF.html", "Petawawa Research Forest"))
    )
  )
)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results='asis'}
site_footer(coverage_file_date)
```

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  const statNumbers = document.querySelectorAll('.homepage-stat-number');
  const statsSection = document.querySelector('.homepage-stats-grid');
  const header = document.querySelector('.homepage-fixed-header');
  const internalLinks = document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]');

  if (header) {
    const onScroll = () => {
      header.classList.toggle('is-scrolled', window.scrollY > 12);
    };
    onScroll();
    document.addEventListener('scroll', onScroll, { passive: true });
  }

  internalLinks.forEach((link) => {
    link.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
      const href = link.getAttribute('href');
      if (!href || href === '#') return;
      const target = document.querySelector(href);
      if (!target) return;
      event.preventDefault();
      const headerOffset = header ? header.offsetHeight + 16 : 0;
      const top = target.getBoundingClientRect().top + window.pageYOffset - headerOffset;
      window.scrollTo({ top, behavior: 'smooth' });
      if (history.replaceState) {
        history.replaceState(null, '', href);
      }
    });
  });

  if (!statNumbers.length || !statsSection) return;

  const animateValue = (node) => {
    const target = Number(node.dataset.target || 0);
    const decimals = Number(node.dataset.decimals || 0);
    const duration = 1100;
    const start = performance.now();

    const step = (timestamp) => {
      const progress = Math.min((timestamp - start) / duration, 1);
      const eased = 1 - Math.pow(1 - progress, 3);
      node.textContent = (target * eased).toLocaleString(undefined, {
        minimumFractionDigits: decimals,
        maximumFractionDigits: decimals
      });
      if (progress < 1) {
        window.requestAnimationFrame(step);
      }
    };

    window.requestAnimationFrame(step);
  };

  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach((entry) => {
      if (!entry.isIntersecting) return;
      statNumbers.forEach((node) => {
        if (node.dataset.animated === 'true') return;
        node.dataset.animated = 'true';
        animateValue(node);
      });
      observer.disconnect();
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.35 });

  observer.observe(statsSection);
});
</script>
```
